arts.ttl: Aston Villa agree £21m transfer as medical booked with Premier League club
arts.sum: Last week, Emery admitted that a loan move was one option for Philogene, since he believes in his potential. Villa took up their option to match the offer and Philogene opted to return to Unai Emery’s squad instead.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa transfer news as £25m Donyell Malen demand made and Douglas Luiz primed for move
arts.sum: Barry has been back at Villa for a week as the club decides where the player's future lies after spending another six months at Stockport County on top of the whole of last season. Villa opened the bidding at £15million, but Dortmund reputedly want closer to £25million, which is around what they paid PSV Eindhoven for the Netherlands international three-and-a-half years ago.

arts.ttl: 'Toxic' - Report: Anonymous West Ham source shares behind-the-scenes update
arts.sum: West Ham United have been dealing with a “toxic” environment this week based around the Julen Lopetegui sacking controversy, according to an unnamed dressing room... The post 'Toxic' - Report: Anonymous West Ham source shares behind-the-scenes update appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Abu Dhabi move already confirmed as Aston Villa co-owner Nassef Sawiris UK exit plan emerges
'Ridiculous' - Tony Cottee rages at West Ham board as millions wasted
arts.sum: Tony Cottee has slammed West Ham for wasting millions by hiring Julen Lopetegui instead of Graham Potter in the summer. The Hammers announced on 8... The post 'Ridiculous' - Tony Cottee rages at West Ham board as millions wasted appeared first on West Ham Zone.
